message:
feat(saga): add ConcurrencyLimitReached test coverage + rustfmt pass

Concurrent agent work adding test vectors for the SagaError::ConcurrencyLimitReached
variant, which was previously present in the error_code HasErrorCode impl but lacked
dedicated test coverage in the integration and edge case suites:

- error_code_edge_cases: new has_error_code_saga_concurrency_limit_reached test
- saga_orchestrator_edge_cases: add ConcurrencyLimitReached to serde roundtrip
  and Display assertion vectors
- saga_orchestrator_integration: same serde/display coverage; rename
  saga_error_serde_all_7_variants → saga_error_serde_all_variants to reflect
  the growing variant count

Source files received a rustfmt pass from concurrent agents:
- franken-verify.rs: closure/error-message formatting normalization
- error_code.rs: match-arm brace elision
- expected_loss_selector.rs: line-break normalization for chained arithmetic
- test_depth_gate.rs: import reorder, closure compaction, assert! formatting
- third_party_verifier.rs: import list + assert! block formatting

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
